seo.title: Pool Simulator | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Visualize your fiberglass pool in your own backyard. Enter your address, view your property on the map, and position your pool with real-life scale before installation.
seo.ogDescription: Design your dream fiberglass pool and see exactly how it fits in your backyard with our interactive Pool Simulator.

hero.subtitle: Visualize your fiberglass pool in your own backyard. Enter your address, view your property on the map, and position your pool with real-life scale and dimensions before installation.

stepsSection.intro: Design your dream pool in minutes — no downloads, no sign-up required.

steps.title: Open Fullscreen
steps.description: Use a computer for the best experience. Click the fullscreen button in the top-right corner for an immersive view.

steps.title: Enter Your Address
steps.description: Type your home address to locate your property on the satellite map. Zoom in to get a clear view of your backyard.

steps.title: Place Your Pool
steps.description: Browse San Juan pool models and select one. Drag it onto your backyard to see how it fits with real-life scale and dimensions.

steps.title: Contact Us
steps.description: Found the perfect model? Contact us for a free quote. We'll help you bring your dream pool to life.

videoSection.paragraph: Watch a quick walkthrough of how to drop a fiberglass pool into your own backyard before trying it yourself.

cta.paragraph: Talk to our team today and get a personalized quote. We'll help you bring your simulation to life.
